title: cyclopeltis semicordata
intro: Cyclopeltis semicordata, also known as the Chinese water shield or water arrow arum, is a type of aquatic plant native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclopeltis semicordata include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and swelling, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Cyclopeltis semicordata is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical applications.
